title: Energizing Slovakian Pork Dumplings
description: A traditional Slovakian dish featuring pork dumplings with a mustardy flavor, steamed to perfection and infused with yuzu, perfect for a post-workout meal. This recipe is also ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the ground pork, yuzu juice, mustard seeds, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour and eggs, then gradually add the water to form a dough.
Knead the dough for about 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into small balls, about 1 inch in diameter.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and place a small spoonful of the pork mixture in the center.
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Place the dumplings in a steamer basket and steam over boiling water for 15 minutes.
Serve the dumplings hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
